[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001000100 3
1 0111111111 9
2 0010110110 5
3 1100111111 8
4 1110101100 6
5 1101101111 8
6 1111010011 7
7 1111111011 9

67 1111111111 a
70 1011010010 5
